segments.text: When you want to give a peace offering and you offer an animal from a herd of cattle, whether male or female, you must present one without any defects before the Lord.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Put your hand on the head of the offering and kill it at the entrance to the Tent of Meeting. Then Aaron's sons the priests will sprinkle the blood on all sides of the altar.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: From the peace offering you are to bring a food offering to the Lord: all the fat that covers the insides,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: both kidneys with the fat on them by the loins, and the best part of the liver, which you are to remove together with the kidneys.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Aaron's sons are to burn this on the altar on top of the burnt offering that is on the burning wood, as a food offering, to be accepted by the Lord.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: When you want to give a peace offering and you offer an animal from a flock of sheep or goats, either male or female, you must present one without any defects before the Lord.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: If you are giving a lamb as your offering, you must present it before the Lord.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Put your hand on the head of the offering and kill it in front of the Tent of Meeting. Then Aaron's sons the priests will sprinkle the blood on all sides of the altar.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: From the peace offering you are to bring a food offering to the Lord made up of its fat: the whole fat tail[^3] removed from close to the tailbone, all the fat that covers the insides,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: both kidneys with the fat on them by the loins, and the best part of the liver, which you are to remove together with the kidneys.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Then the priest is to burn this on the altar as a food offering, a food offering to the Lord.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: If your offering is a goat, you are to present it before the Lord.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Put your hand on its head and kill it in front of the Tent of Meeting. Then Aaron's sons the priests will sprinkle the blood on all sides of the altar.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: From your offering you are to present a food offering to the Lord made up of all the fat that covers the insides,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: both kidneys with the fat on them by the loins, and the best part of the liver, which you are to remove together with the kidneys.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Then the priest is to burn this on the altar as a food offering, an offering to the Lord using fire. All the fat is for the Lord.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: You must not eat any fat or any blood. This regulation is for all time and for all future generations everywhere you live.
segments.speaker: The LORD
